hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives at VASPs with a consolidated view of AML risk and case workflows to enhance operational oversight and strengthen audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Leadership visibility fades across AML workflows
problem_description: Executives struggle to get a unified view of AML risk and case activity when data remains divided across multiple compliance tools. This limits timely decision-making and weakens audit readiness for compliance leadership at digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects case activity, wallet and transaction risk, provider outputs and decision logs into a unified dashboard so executives gain clear visibility and stronger audit readiness across AML workflows.
workflow_title: From alerts to executive risk overview
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates alerts and provider data into structured cases with decision logs and evidence to deliver clear AML risk visibility for leadership teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented data. One risk view
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a unified compliance layer that connects AML risk signals, case activity, decisions and evidence for clearer operational control and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP leadership with a controlled compliance layer that integrates risk data, preserves audit evidence and enables clearer bank due diligence and governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support executive AML risk visibility
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how AML case activity is summarized for leadership
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit-ready evidence supports compliance decisions
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY improves scalable risk control oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive AML risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected view of AML risk and case activity, connecting compliance workflows, alerts, cases and reports for effective operational oversight and decision-making.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support AML risk dashboards?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider outputs into real-time AML risk dashboards, showing alerts, cases, and trends to help leadership monitor enterprise risk and compliance activity efficiently.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by maintaining structured case histories, decision logs and supporting documentation to support traceability and review readiness for AML compliance audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into one controlled operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but links their results into structured workflows, evidence packages and reports for more scalable and auditable compliance operations.
final_title: Give leadership clear visibility into AML risk
final_description: Review how SFTY connects AML risk signals, case activity and audit evidence into one executive compliance dashboard.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
